'''Gal Milnor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that housed the main supply base used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to store food, munitions and fuel. The base, along with a sizeable fleet of Alliance freighters, was [[Battle of Gal Milnor|destroyed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. This setback forced the Alliance to seek supplies from [[Dunari]] and the [[Hurrim]].
